name: claude-content-skills
description: 13 free Claude skills that run your whole reel factory — idea to leads. Content Factory (one-command orchestrator) + Going Viral (strategy), AI Brain memory, Agent Reach (scrape Reddit/web + download reels), Reel Analyzer, Viral Hook Writer, Reel Scripter, Reel Builder, Caption & Hashtags, Content Repurposer, Content Calendar, and Comment Responder, and Content Research (research any niche → find what blew up → the playbook). By Ootto.
